style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Porygon's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished surface. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its armor seams, casting sharp blue-white light that illuminates metallic dust particles swirling in slow motion. A cool, precise aura of electric blue radiates from its body in geometric waves, casting a sharp, metallic glow across the environment. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
